title: Ron Coker
compiled_truth: Ron Coker is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2002-05-06), Ron Coker sent 39 and received 114 emails, totalling 153 interactions. Top correspondents: [Andrew Kelemen](people/andrew-kelemen) (28), [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (23), [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (20), [David Parquet](people/david-parquet) (16), [Christopher Calger](people/christopher-calger) (11). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, discussion_threads, misc, new_england_ny.
